nodes.label: Open-Meteo Weather Provider
nodes.rationale: Default weather provider (WEATHER_PROVIDER=open_meteo); uses ERA5 archive and forecast APIs, free with no API key required.

nodes.label: Visual Crossing Weather Provider
nodes.rationale: Alternative provider selected via WEATHER_PROVIDER=visual_crossing; requires VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY.

nodes.label: Redis
nodes.rationale: Required for fast in-memory caching, rate limiting, job queuing, and location selection tracking.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Persistent Cache
nodes.rationale: Optional long-term cache for historical temperature data, location aliasing, and social share persistence; app degrades gracefully without it.

nodes.label: Async Job Processing
nodes.rationale: Heavy temperature computations are queued to Redis and processed by a background worker so API requests return quickly with job polling.

nodes.label: Firebase App Check
nodes.rationale: Optional proof-of-origin via X-Firebase-AppCheck header; APP_CHECK_ENFORCEMENT modes off/monitor/enforce control blocking; CORS must allow the header for browser preflights.

nodes.label: Location Usage Tracking
nodes.rationale: POST /v1/locations/selections records user location picks in Redis sorted sets to derive dynamic popular locations rankings over a rolling window.

nodes.label: Social Sharing
nodes.rationale: Share records stored in PostgreSQL with Redis cache; OG preview PNG generated at GET /v1/og/{share_id}.png for social crawlers.

nodes.label: API_ACCESS_TOKEN
nodes.rationale: Server-side bearer token for automation, Postman, and cache warming; bypasses rate limiting and App Check; not for end-user clients.

nodes.label: MAPBOX_TOKEN
nodes.rationale: Mapbox public token for location geocoding in /v1/locations/search; without it autocomplete falls back to preapproved list.

nodes.label: Single-Flight Protection
nodes.rationale: Redis locks prevent cache stampedes when multiple concurrent requests miss the same cache key.
